3.text: I'm on a paid plan, but it constantly tries to ram artists at me that are totally unrelated to my tastes/listening history. Favourite artists list is plain wrong - it includes some that I listened to perhaps twice. DJ feature is just awful - pure irritating junk. SongDNA is flawed - it listed only one member of a duo! Overall, a very poor and confused UI that is all about cold algorithmic commercial promotion. Spotify has embraced the phenomenon of "ensh!tt!fication" and made it their religion.
